review:
Wowww! This place has been on my list to try for a while. We finally made it out this past Sunday night around 7pm. The restaurant was busy but we were sat right away. It took a little bit for our server to come over, but again, it was pretty packed.

We ordered 3 pizzas -- pepperoni, white, and square margherita. The pepperoni was hands down something that I will crave for weeks and months to come. I didn't want to stop eating it! The white pizza had an amazing cheese ratio but it could've had a little more garlic and ricotta on it. The margherita was exceptional as well but didn't compare to the pepperoni.

Somehow we saved enough room to order one of each dessert -- cheesecake, mini cannolis, and chocolate cake. The chocolate cake was actually really dry and not my favorite. Cannolis were delicious but that cheesecake was everything!! I'm not sure why but the after taste was reminiscent of rice pudding (which I loved!). It was one of my favorite cheesecakes. Classic yet unique.

The pepperoni pizza and the cheesecake were 5-star-worthy but I did dock the review 1 star because the other items were on the more average side. We also had to ask for drink refills multiple times. I will 100% recommend to anyone and I will go back, especially now that I really know what to order. I just saw reviews about the wings so I'm excited to give those a shot when I go back.
